name: RETRIS
short_description: A fresh take on the the falling block puzzle genre. Embrace imperfection with glitches and broken pieces to overcome this new challenge. Chase high scores or learn new techniques in a puzzle mode with over 50 handcrafted puzzles.
detailed_description:
A classic formula with new mind breaking twists.

Relearn

Experience the thrill of being a beginner again and reach for mastery.

Recombined

Retro glitch aesthetics and mechanics.

Features include:

  • "Broken" pieces with a whole new set of interesting possibilities and challenges.
  • Gain "Pills" to remove any piece that you don't want.
  • "Corruption Trail": Speed up any piece to be able to remove all lines at once.
  • Puzzle mode with over 50 handcrafted puzzles that teaches new techniques.
  • Choose between 3 original musical themes.
  • Cat mascot!
